rationale: Both correctly identify the duplicate-of-#4808 disposition matching the ground truth, but X asserts as verified fact things it couldn't actually confirm ("now merged into main," specific line-2239 comment text, a regression test file covering all five loaders) — overconfident fabrication risk, especially since the agent's actual vantage point is the rebase branch, not upstream main. Y makes the same core call but explicitly separates what it could verify (the rebase-branch fix, the test's coverage gap) from what it couldn't (whether #4808 actually merged upstream), flagging the open question rather than asserting it — more honest grounding and more useful to the reporter. Y also surfaces a concrete, verifiable follow-up (missing file in _STALE_API_FILES) that closes the loop, giving it stronger completeness.
